name: たんぼ
short_description: I was walking along the rice paddy path with my dog ​​Bonta. That was all I wanted to do. My ordinary daily life was suddenly shattered.
detailed_description:
"Tanbo" is a short walking simulator horror game in which you take a walk along a rice paddy path at night with your dog, Bonta.

Story

It's a summer night after a typhoon has passed. As usual, you take Bonta for a walk.

However, your walks with Bonta become stranger day by day, and strange things start happening around you...

Game Content

This game is an adventure game in which you move and work from a first-person perspective.

The basic game is to take your dog, Bonta, for a walk along a rice paddy path, and when you get home, prepare water and food for Bonta.

There is also a game over, so be careful of any strange occurrences you may encounter.

Number of Endings: 2

Controls

Movement: WASD

Action: E

Menu: M

Text forwarding: Space bar

Video streaming

・Streaming is possible without permission from individuals or corporations.

・Monetization is only possible if you use the functions provided by the video streaming site.

・We would appreciate it if you could include the name of the game in the title of your video or stream, and include a link to the Steam page in the description section or elsewhere. (This is optional.)

We are not responsible for any damages caused by streaming videos of this game.

The contents of this guideline may change without notice.
